---
title: 'Topos Transitions'
date: '2017-06-15T05:35:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4327787388100971134'
blogger_filename: '/2017/06/topos-transitions.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Perspective'
  - 'Personal and Spiritual Growth'
---

<p dir="ltr">Transitions are rough. </p>
<p dir="ltr">I've been through many seasons of my life where I had to make a transition. At each and every stage it was tough. </p>
<p dir="ltr">There are always things you miss about the last season, things you are hoping for in the next season, and things you can't wait to be rid of in the season you're leaving behind.</p>
<p dir="ltr">Whether you are sensing the winds of change blowing you out of your current situation, you are in the middle of the trip, or the winds are at your back and you settling in to your new spot... Remember this word: Topos</p>
<p dir="ltr">Topos is a Greek word and it essentially means:</p>
<p dir="ltr">Your strategic position of opportunity and influence.</p>
<p dir="ltr">Make your Topos count today, wherever you are.</p>
<p dir="ltr">Darrell<br><br><br><br><br></p>
